name: Today's Sales
query:
SELECT
    DAYNAME(CURDATE()) AS "Today",
    COUNT(combined.`name`) AS "Total Invoices",
    ROUND(SUM(combined.`net_total`), 2) AS "Item Total",
    ROUND(SUM(combined.`total_taxes_and_charges`), 2) AS "Total Taxes and Charges",
    ROUND(SUM(combined.`grand_total`), 2) AS "Grand Total",
    ROUND(SUM(combined.`grand_total` - combined.`rounded_total`), 2) AS "Round Off",
    ROUND(SUM(combined.`rounded_total` - combined.`paid_amount` + combined.`change_amount`), 2) AS "Cash Discounts"
FROM (
    /* Source 1: POS Invoices */
    SELECT 
        name, branch, docstatus, status, posting_date, posting_time,
        net_total, total_taxes_and_charges, grand_total, rounded_total, paid_amount, change_amount
    FROM `tabPOS Invoice`
    WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'POS Invoice'

    UNION ALL

    /* Source 2: Sales Invoices created using POS */
    SELECT 
        name, branch, docstatus, status, posting_date, posting_time,
        net_total, total_taxes_and_charges, grand_total, rounded_total, paid_amount, change_amount
    FROM `tabSales Invoice`
    WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'Sales Invoice'
      AND is_pos = 1 
      AND is_created_using_pos = 1
) AS combined
LEFT JOIN `tabURY Report Settings` rs ON (
    rs.`branch` = %(branch)s
)
WHERE
    combined.`branch` = %(branch)s
    AND combined.`docstatus` = 1
    AND combined.`status` IN ("Consolidated", "Paid", "Completed") 
    AND (
        ((rs.`hours` IS NULL OR rs.`hours` = 0) AND combined.`posting_date` = CURDATE())
        OR (rs.`hours` > 0 
            AND TIMESTAMP(combined.`posting_date`, combined.`posting_time`) <= TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00')) 
            AND TIMESTAMP(combined.`posting_date`, combined.`posting_time`) >= TIMESTAMP(CURDATE(), CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00'))
        )
        OR (rs.`branch` IS NULL AND combined.`posting_date` = CURDATE())
    )
